sourceId.title: Source ID
sourceId.description: Identifier for the agent calling the action.

individualId.title: Individual ID
individualId.description: The individual ID associated with a Data Cloud profile.

individualKeyQualifier.title: Individual Key Qualifier
individualKeyQualifier.description: The key that uniquely identifies an individual when the same ID is present in multiple data sources.

subjectId.title: Subject ID
subjectId.description: The ID of the topic that's used by the personalization context action to determine relevant profile data. This decision is based on the topics instructions and associated actions.
